name: gcw-skill
description: Evidence-driven website cloning, technical teardown, and reconstruction toolkit

scripts.check:syntax: node --check scripts/url_safety.mjs && node --check scripts/site_inventory.mjs && node --check scripts/detect_interaction_states.mjs && node --check scripts/capture_compare.mjs && node --check scripts/check_environment.mjs && python -m compileall -q scripts
scripts.verify: npm run check:syntax && npm test && npm run check:base
